body.title: Migrate wild_igor/igor/cognition/* logging to self.log + get_logger pattern
body.result: 58 cognition files migrated. Whole-codebase metrics: logging_bypass 368→225, legacy_log 664→430, classes_missing_inheritance 23→0. cognition/* specifically: 357→23 callsites. 4119 tests pass.
body.description:
Replace logging.getLogger bypass + _log/logger legacy across wild_igor/igor/cognition/ (~60+ files). Largest area. Gate on T-logging-migrate-utility-closet so the pattern is established and tested first.

Top offenders from 2026-04-29 audit:
- emit_channels.py: 20 _log sites
- experiment_cascade.py: 12 _log sites
- consult.py: 8 _log sites
- cluster_router.py: 8 _log sites
- distillation.py: 7 _log sites
- basal_ganglia.py: 10 logging.getLogger sites
- many more — full list in lab/claudecode/reports/logging_audit_20260429-211639.md

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/*.py — ~60 files with logging-bypass or legacy-_log sites.
**Design rules:** inherit-base-class palace rule. Pattern from T-logging-migrate-utility-closet.
**Scope boundary:** in scope: cognition/ callsite migration. Out of scope: brainstem/, memory/, network/, tools/ (separate ticket if needed).
**Test plan:** full regression suite must pass. Re-run audit_logging.py and confirm cognition/ legacy/bypass counts collapsed. Live Igor smoke run after migration to verify log routing intact.
